zh.Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Champagne,: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel De Grenville於1118年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德艾林加姆時，她的父親Roger de Joinville26歲，母親Aldéarde de Vignory23歲。她於1148年與Ralph De Gaugy在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德艾林加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於從1165年1月8日到1167年1月7日。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel De Grenville于1118年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德艾林加姆时，她的父亲Roger de Joinville26岁，母亲Aldéarde de Vignory23岁。她于1148年与Ralph De Gaugy在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德艾林加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于从1165年1月8日到1167年1月7日。

nameMeanings.name: Grenville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel De Grenville was born in 1118, in Ellingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Joinville, was 26 and her mother, Aldéarde de Vignory, was 23. She married Ralph De Gaugy in 1148, in Ellingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died from 8 January 1165 to 7 January 1167.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel De Grenville est née en 1118, à Ellingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Joinville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Aldéarde de Vignory, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph De Gaugy en 1148, à Ellingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée du 8 janvier 1165 au 7 janvier 1167.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel De Grenville 1118 in Ellingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Joinville 26 und ihre Mutter Aldéarde de Vignory 23. Sie hat 1148 in Ellingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Ralph De Gaugy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb von 8. Januar 1165 bis 7. Januar 1167.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel De Grenville è nata il nel 1118 nel Ellingham, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger de Joinville, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Aldéarde de Vignory, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Ralph De Gaugy nel 1148, nel Ellingham, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì da 8 gennaio 1165 a 7 gennaio 1167.

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel De Grenville(이)가 1118년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 엘링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Joinville(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aldéarde de Vignory(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 엘링함에서 Ralph De Gaugy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 1월 8일부터 1167년 1월 7일까지 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel De Grenville родилась в 1118 г. в местности эллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Joinville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Aldéarde de Vignory, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph De Gaugy в 1148 г. в местности эллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла с 8 января 1165 по 7 января 1167.
